entity.label: Uzziah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Jehonathan, one of David’s overseers (1 Chr. 27:25).

nodes.label: Uzziah
nodes.description: The father of Jehonathan, one of David’s overseers (1 Chr. 27:25).

nodes.label: Jehonathan
nodes.description: One of the stewards of David’s store-houses (1 Chr. 27:25).

verses.text: And over the king’s treasures was Azmaveth the son of Adiel: and over the storehouses in the fields, in the cities, and in the villages, and in the castles, was Jehonathan the son of Uzziah:
